scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @mulen/shared && npm run typecheck -w @mulen/api && npm run typecheck -w @mulen/worker && npm run typecheck -w @mulen/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @mulen/shared && npm run build -w @mulen/api && npm run build -w @mulen/worker && npm run build -w @mulen/web
